action.reasoning: Observation: Current best IC 0.0579 from ensemble of two LightGBM models (DART and GBDT). Analysis: Adding a third diverse model (e.g., GOSS boosting) may further improve generalization and ensemble diversity. Using existing two models and training one new model saves time (~25 min), well within remaining budget (1.93h). Decision: Write new train.py that copies existing models into ensemble_ckpt, trains a GOSS LightGBM on same data, and saves all three for ensemble prediction. Submit eval to measure improvement.
